description_long: This is a compact, freestanding kitchen or utility cart with a rectangular wooden top and a black painted frame. The cart features a single pull-out drawer with a rounded black handle, two open shelves beneath the drawer, and four small caster wheels for mobility. The wooden top has a natural grain finish, contrasting with the matte black body. The open shelves provide accessible storage, while the drawer offers concealed space for smaller items. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for use in kitchens, garages, or urban outdoor settings. The cart's sturdy construction and mobile base make it ideal for flexible storage and workspace needs.
description: A compact, mobile kitchen or utility cart with a wood-grain top, black frame, drawer, open shelves, and caster wheels. Modern and functional, it offers both open and concealed storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wood top, single drawer with handle, and two open shelves below.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the wood top and the open structure of the shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, but without the drawer handle visible; open shelves are clearly seen.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the wood top and open shelving, with no drawer handle visible.
